question: What is the name of the parent collection of the collection named Nice?
sql: SELECT C2.Collection_Name FROM Collections C1 JOIN Collections C2 ON C1.Parent_Collection_ID = C2.Collection_ID WHERE C1.Collection_Name = 'Nice';

back_translation.intent: 获取特定名称的集合的父集合ID

semantic.reason: 目标列不一致，原始问题要求父集合的名称，而SQL反向翻译描述仅获取父集合ID
